title: Montana
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Montana

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Montana

You can apply for Medicaid in Montana by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Montana

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Montana

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Montana

CHIP in Montana

Healthy Montana Kids Plus covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Healthy Montana Kids Plus right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Healthy Montana Kids Plus.
